title: Katya Adler: Europe's Nato allies push back at reported US threat to Spain
summary_full: On Friday morning, souring relations between Europe and the United States  reared its Medusa-like head again, writes the BBC's Europe editor.
summary_public: On Friday morning, souring relations between Europe and the United States  reared its Medusa-like head again, writes the BBC's Europe editor.
